zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Flegg於大約1190年出生在英國諾福爾可德雷哈姆時，他的父親John De Flegg27歲，母親Margaret de Bassingham22歲。他於1215年與Beatrice在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1242年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Flegg于大约1190年出生在英国諾福爾可德雷哈姆时，他的父亲John De Flegg27岁，母亲Margaret de Bassingham22岁。他于1215年与Beatrice在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1242年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Flegg was born about 1190, in Dereham, Norfolk, England, his father, John De Flegg, was 27 and his mother, Margaret de Bassingham, was 22. He married Beatrice in 1215, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Flegg est né environ 1190, à Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John De Flegg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Bassingham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice en 1215, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Flegg um 1190 in Dereham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Flegg 27 und seine Mutter Margaret de Bassingham 22. Er hat 1215 in England, United Kingdom Beatrice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1242 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Flegg è nato il circa 1190 nel Dereham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John De Flegg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Bassingham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice nel 1215, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Fleggが約1190年にイギリスノーフォルクデレハムで生まれた時，父John De Fleggは27歳，母Margaret de Bassinghamは22歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスでBeatriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1242年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Flegg(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 노르폴크 더함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Flegg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Bassingham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Beatrice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1242년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Flegg nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Flegg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Bassingham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice em 1215, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1242, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Flegg родился около 1190 г. в местности дирэам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Flegg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Bassingham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice в 1215 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Flegg nació aproximadamente 1190, en Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Flegg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret de Bassingham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Beatrice en 1215, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
